title: Tangy Jamaican Graham Cracker Crumbs Galette
description:
A sweet and tangy dessert featuring graham cracker crumbs and a touch of Jamaican flair, perfect for a crowd.
This galette is egg-free-friendly and can be made in under an hour.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the graham cracker crumbs, melted butter, island jerk spice mix, and brown sugar until well combined.
Press the crumb mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Bake the crust for 8 minutes, or until lightly browned.
In a large bowl, whisk together the coconut flakes, lime juice, honey, all-purpose flour, and confectioners sugar until well combined.
Spread the filling over the baked crust, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Bake the galette for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the filling is set and the crust is golden brown.
Allow the galette to cool completely in the pan before slicing and serving.
Slice the galette into 8-10 pieces and serve warm or at room temperature.
